allies.rationale_text: Probabilistic-thinking gives monte-carlo-methods the core commitment to ranges and distributions instead of point forecasts.
allies.source_quote: The fundamental essence of this model is probabilistic thinking

allies.rationale_text: Base-rates ground monte-carlo-methods in reference classes so simulated inputs are not built from wishful stories alone.
Game-theory-payoffs helps monte-carlo-methods stress-test adversarial moves and countermoves rather than sampling only passive scenarios.

antagonists.rationale_text: False-precision-avoidance protects monte-carlo-methods from projecting exactness that the input assumptions have not earned.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Monte-carlo-methods conflicts with simplification when simulation complexity obscures the dominant variables a simpler closed-form analysis would reveal.
structured_tensions.source_quote: monte-carlo-methods conflicts with simplification (simplification) when simulation complexity obscures the dominant variables a simpler closed-form analysis would reveal.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Monte-carlo-methods conflicts with false-precision-avoidance when Monte Carlo distributions create an illusion of precision around fundamentally unquantifiable inputs.
structured_tensions.source_quote: monte-carlo-methods conflicts with false-precision-avoidance (false precision avoidance) when Monte Carlo distributions create an illusion of precision around fundamentally unquantifiable inputs.
